title: User
description: Represents a Microsoft Entra ID user account. Contains identity, contact, organizational, and authentication properties.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user (GUID). Assigned automatically by the directory.

displayName.description: The name displayed in the address book for the user

givenName.description: The given name (first name) of the user

surname.description: The surname (family name) of the user

mail.description: The SMTP address of the user. This property cannot be set during creation for cloud-only users.

userPrincipalName.description: The user principal name (UPN) of the user in the format alias@domain. The domain must be present in the tenant's verified domains collection.

mailNickname.description: The mail alias for the user. Must be specified when creating a new user.

accountEnabled.description: true if the account is enabled; otherwise, false. Must be specified when creating a new user.

department.description: The department in which the user works

officeLocation.description: The office location in the user's place of business

companyName.description: The company name associated with the user

mobilePhone.description: The primary cellular telephone number for the user

businessPhones.description: The telephone numbers for the user's business

streetAddress.description: The street address of the user's place of business

city.description: The city in which the user is located

state.description: The state or province in the user's address

postalCode.description: The postal code for the user's postal address

country.description: The country or region in which the user is located (ISO 3166 two-letter code)

usageLocation.description: Two-letter country code (ISO 3166). Required for users assigned licenses due to legal requirements for checking service availability.

preferredLanguage.description: The preferred language for the user in ISO 639-1 code format (e.g., en-US)

userType.description: Classification of the user type relative to the tenant

employeeId.description: The employee identifier assigned by the organization

employeeType.description: Captures the type of worker (e.g., Employee, Contractor, Consultant, Vendor)

employeeHireDate.description: The date and time when the user was hired

onPremisesSyncEnabled.description: true if this user is synced from an on-premises directory; false if originally created in Azure AD; null if never synced

onPremisesSamAccountName.description: The on-premises SAM account name synchronized from the on-premises directory

proxyAddresses.description: List of proxy addresses for the user including SMTP and smtp prefixed addresses

createdDateTime.description: The date and time the user was created

lastSignInDateTime.description: The date and time of the user's most recent interactive sign-in activity
